channel.title: briefUpdatesHealthOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesHealthOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Under financial strain, primary care doctors unite
item.description: Under increasing financial stress, primary care practices across the U.S. are banding together in larger groups to negotiate more lucrative insurance ...

item.title: GLP-1s have transformed weight loss and diabetes. Is addiction next?
item.description: A large study found that people taking GLP-1 drugs like Ozempic for diabetes were less likely to be diagnosed with substance use disorder.

item.title: Liberal Arts Education As a Counterbalance To Trumpian AI
item.description: By MIKE MAGEE What’s wrong in the social science realm of health? Consider for example the mental health crises affecting teens across the nation, or ...

item.title: Why the 'mad scramble' to fill hormone therapy prescriptions for menopause
item.description: With the removal of FDA warning labels, hormone therapy to treat symptoms of menopause has grown in popularity. Now some patients are reporting delays...

item.title: More Kids Are in ERs for Tooth Pain. Trump Cuts and RFK Jr.’s Anti-Fluoride Fight Aren’t Helping.
item.description: Dentists, hygienists, and researchers say a shortage of rural dental care professionals and worsening oral hygiene since the covid-19 pandemic mean mo...

item.title: Banks Are Becoming Bulwarks Against Scams for Vulnerable Seniors
item.description: Older Americans are losing billions of dollars annually to financial exploitation. Banks and investment firms are training employees to spot red flags...

item.title: Menopause hormone therapy is popular, so why the 'mad scramble' to fill prescriptions?
item.description: With the removal of the black-box warning on hormone therapy for menopause, some providers and patients report shortages or delays, waiting for a phar...

item.title: Florida Hasn’t Expanded Medicaid. Lawmakers Want To Add Work Requirements Anyway.
item.description: Florida is not mandated to add work requirements for Medicaid, because the state has not expanded eligibility to more low-income adults. But lawmakers...

item.title: Why young girls are disguised as boys in Afghanistan
item.description: The Taliban has released a video of an interrogation of a girl who passed as a boy. It's an age-old practice in this patriarchal society but now appea...

item.title: Florida no amplió Medicaid, pero igual algunos legisladores quieren imponer requisitos de trabajo
item.description: La medida desconcierta a defensores de la atención médica y a expertos en Medicaid. Algunos dudan, incluso, que sea legal bajo la principal ley de pol...

item.title: Newsom se enfrenta a Trump y RFK Jr. por la salud pública
item.description: El gobernador de California, Gavin Newsom, se ha posicionado como un líder nacional en salud pública al impulsar políticas respaldadas por la ciencia,...

item.title: Lauren Ranalli, Town Square Health
item.description: Lauren Ranalli is the VP of Patient & Community Engagement at Town Square Health, a brand new medical group setting itself up for the senior populatio...

item.title: When Artificial Intelligence Starts Rewriting Reality
item.description: By BRIAN JOONDEPH Artificial intelligence is quickly becoming a core part of healthcare operations. It drafts clinical notes, summarizes patient visit...

item.title: Oren Nissim, Brook-ai – Figuring out RPM
item.description: Oren Nissim is the CEO of Brook-ai which is making some waves in the remote care space. Their goals is to use remote patient monitoring to help provid...

item.title: Miriam Paramore, RxUtility
item.description: In this quickbite interview recorded at the Feb 2026 VIVE conference, I am talking with Miriam Paramore. Miriam is building RxUtility, which is helpin...
